title: Redstone Tweaks Carpet Addon
description: Adds power indicators to various Redstone Tweaks textures
body:
# ✨ Redstone Tweaks Carpet Addon This addon for my Redstone Tweaks Resource Pack adds power indicators to hoppers, droppers and dispensers.

## 📌 Note With Minecraft 1.20.2, Mojang finally fixed hopper, dropper & dispenser blockstates. I have therefore merged this addon into Redstone Tweaks 2.4. It is no longer required and will not receive further updates. ## ⚠️ Important (pre-1.20.2) Due to a limitation with Minecraft's code, this addon works best together with the Carpet Extra mod by gnembon. Once installed, simply run the following command in your world: ``` /carpet blockStateSyncing true ``` This ensures all blocks visually update correctly. In Multiplayer, the mod has to be installed on the server for everything to function properly. ## 🙏🏻 Credits & Special Thanks Some of the textures are based on work from other creators. Go check them out! - Droppers and Dispensers based on textures by Beatso (Little Improvements: Redstone) - Hopper side arrow texture from Vanilla Tweaks - Special thanks to my Discord moderator Junq for helping out with some of the textures!
